description_long: This house is a single-story residential structure surrounded by dense, leafy trees that provide significant shade and privacy. The building features a gable roof with a light gray finish and a small covered porch at the front, supported by columns. The entryway is defined by a short set of steps leading up to the porch, with a pathway connecting to a dark, paved driveway. The windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, flanking the central entry door, and are rectangular in shape. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence, enhancing its suburban character. The landscaping is lush, with the house nestled within a thick canopy of trees, making it appear secluded and tranquil.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, white picket fence, and dense tree cover, featuring a central porch and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entry porch, white picket fence, symmetrical windows, and the main pathway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Left side view dominated by dense tree cover, with the driveway and part of the fence visible.
description_view_2: Rear view almost entirely obscured by thick trees, with only the roof and some fencing faintly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway, tree canopy, and a partial glimpse of the house's side and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small covered porch, steps, columns, and a white picket fence.
